NACS898 Pre-Candidacy Research (1-8 Credits)

NACS899 Doctoral Dissertation Research (1-8 Credits) Indivdual instruction course: contact department or instructor to obtain section number Restriction: Must be in Neurosciences and Cognitive Sciences (Doctoral) program.

NFSC414 Mechanics of Food Processing (4 Credits) Applications in the processing and preservation of foods, of power transmission, hydraulics, electricity, thermodynamics, refrigeration, instruments and controls, materials handling and time and motion analysis. Prerequisite: PHYS121. Credit Only Granted for: ENBE414 or NFSC414. Formerly: ENBE414.
